# Discretization

**Path:** `global_descriptor/handcrafted/discretization`

Handcrafted descriptors based on spatial bins, histograms, signatures, or discrete scan partitions.

## Scope

**Include:** fixed bins; adaptive bins; height or occupancy signatures

**Exclude:** raw-point learned embeddings

## Papers (3)
